en.title: Best Robot Vacuums of 2026: Expert-Tested & Ranked
en.description: The top robot vacuums of 2026 ranked by cleaning performance, obstacle avoidance, and self-maintenance automation — from budget-friendly picks to flagship models with 35,000 Pa suction.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳掃地機器人排行榜：實測推薦
zh-tw.description: 2026 年掃地機器人推薦，涵蓋吸力、拖地、自動清洗基站等全方位評比，從入門到旗艦都有最佳選擇。

en.description: The strongest robot vacuum in 2026 with 35,000 Pa suction, 100°C hot-water mop self-cleaning, and retractable LiDAR for ultra-slim clearance.

zh-tw.description: 2026 年吸力最強旗艦，35,000 Pa、100°C 熱水自清拖布，可縮式 LiDAR 讓機身超薄，幾乎沒有鑽不進去的傢俱底部。

en.description: Roborock's 2026 flagship with solid-state LiDAR, 21,600 ToF sensor points, and an extending FlexiArm mop that reaches corners other robots miss.

zh-tw.description: Roborock 旗艦機，固態 LiDAR 搭配 21,600 點 ToF 感測器，FlexiArm 可伸縮拖布頭能貼牆清潔到角落，障礙物辨識能力在業界頂尖。

en.description: Dreame's ProLeap system climbs over obstacles up to 6 cm high, and 19,500 Pa suction with hot-water mop cleaning makes it the previous Vacuum Wars champion.

zh-tw.description: ProLeap 爬坡系統可越過 6 公分障礙，19,500 Pa 加熱水拖布，在 X60 問世前是 Vacuum Wars 長期排名第一的機型，促銷時 CP 值爆表。

en.description: The Qrevo CurvX combines 22,000 Pa HyperForce suction with an AdaptiLift chassis that raises over thresholds, and an 80°C dock for thorough mop sterilization.

zh-tw.description: 22,000 Pa 高吸力加 AdaptiLift 升降底盤，可跨越門檻，基站 80°C 熱水洗拖布有效殺菌，是 Roborock 中價旗艦的最佳選擇。

en.description: With up to 350 minutes of battery life and TruEdge adaptive mopping that covers 99% of floor edges, the X5 Pro Omni is built for large homes and marathon cleaning sessions.

zh-tw.description: 最長可達 350 分鐘的超長續航，TruEdge 貼邊拖地覆蓋率 99%，特別適合大坪數空間，一次出去掃整間不用回充。

en.description: The X10 Pro Omni delivers flagship-tier features — LiDAR navigation, AI obstacle avoidance, dual spinning mops with auto-lift, and a full base station — at a significantly lower price than the competition.

zh-tw.description: LiDAR 導航、AI 障礙物識別、雙旋轉拖布自動抬升、全功能基站，功能齊全卻比同等級競品便宜一大截，是最強的中價旗艦。

en.description: Narwal's conical brush design eliminates hair tangles entirely, and DirtSense auto-adjusts mopping pressure — a standout choice for pet owners and households that prioritize mopping quality.

zh-tw.description: 圓錐形主刷讓頭髮纏繞問題幾乎歸零，DirtSense 自動感應髒污程度調整拖地力道，有毛小孩的家庭用下去會很有感。

en.description: The Roomba j9+ brings Dirt Detective AI that automatically prioritizes the dirtiest rooms, a 60-day self-empty base, and the industry's best pet-waste avoidance — now under Picea ownership after iRobot filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy in December 2025.

zh-tw.description: Dirt Detective AI 自動判斷哪個房間最髒優先清掃，60 天自動倒垃圾，標榜寵物排泄物辨識迴避。2025 年 12 月 iRobot 申請破產後由中國廠商 Picea 接手，未來走向還在觀察中。

en.description: The L20 Ultra's MopExtend system automatically pushes the mop pads outward to clean along baseboards, paired with a massive 4.5L clean water tank and up to 260 minutes of quiet-mode runtime.

zh-tw.description: MopExtend 拖布自動向外延伸貼牆清潔踢腳線，搭配 4.5 公升超大水箱，靜音模式可連跑 260 分鐘，大坪數家庭用起來很順心。

en.description: The Shark Matrix Plus uses a grid-pattern Matrix Clean algorithm and Sonic Mopping at 100 oscillations per minute, with HEPA filtration in the self-empty base — a strong mid-range pick for North American households.

zh-tw.description: Matrix Clean 網格式清掃演算法搭配每分鐘 100 次震動拖地，基站配備 HEPA 過濾，北美市場性價比高，但台灣目前無官方代理。

en.description: The Saros Z70 is the first mass-produced robot vacuum with a 5-axis OmniGrip robotic arm that can pick up objects up to 300g off the floor before cleaning, pairing that capability with 22,000 Pa suction and a 79.8mm slim chassis.

zh-tw.description: 史上第一款量產配備五軸機械手臂的掃地機，OmniGrip 可以直接把地上 300g 以內的雜物抓起來再開始清掃，搭配 22,000 Pa 吸力，機身只有 79.8mm，可以鑽桌子底下。這個功能真的是打開新格局。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums 2026 — Vacuum Wars
Best Robot Vacuums 2026 — RTINGS
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete Review — Vacuum Wars
Roborock Saros 10R Review — RTINGS
Best Robot Vacuums of CES 2026 — Tom's Guide

en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete takes the top spot in 2026, and it earns it on merit. Vacuum Wars scored it 4.08 out of 5, displacing the L50 Ultra after months at the top of the rankings. The 35,000 Pa suction is the highest I've seen in this category, and the 100°C ThermoHub hot-water mop self-cleaning is not a gimmick — it actually sterilizes the mop pads in a way that lower-temperature competitors cannot. The retractable LiDAR that drops to 7.95 cm body height means it reaches under sofas and bed frames that most other robots have to skip.

The Roborock Saros 10R at second place is the better choice if obstacle detection is your primary concern. Its StarSight 2.0 solid-state LiDAR with 21,600 ToF sensor points is the most sophisticated navigation system currently shipping in a consumer robot vacuum. I ranked the Saros 10R second rather than first because Dreame's cleaning thoroughness and suction advantage is real, but the margin is closer than the rankings suggest.

The Dreame L50 Ultra at third is where the value story gets interesting. At around $850–$999 during promotions, it delivers 19,500 Pa suction and the ProLeap leg system that climbs obstacles up to 6 cm. It held the Vacuum Wars top spot for months before the X60 arrived. For most households, the L50 Ultra's performance gap relative to the X60 Max Ultra is hard to justify spending an extra $500–$700 to close.

The Ecovacs X5 Pro Omni earns its fifth-place ranking through one standout spec: up to 350 minutes of battery life. For homes over 2,000 square feet, this matters more than an extra 10,000 Pa of suction you'll never fully need. The Eufy X10 Pro Omni at sixth is the benchmark for accessible flagship features, delivering LiDAR, AI obstacle avoidance, and a full base station at $649 — half the price of the Dreame flagship.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra earns the top ranking through measurable margins, not marketing
highlights.body: The 35,000 Pa suction figure is more than double what a mid-range robot vacuum produces, and in practice it shows on deep-pile carpets and pet hair embedded in area rugs. The combination of retractable LiDAR, dual binocular AI cameras, and VIO navigation means the robot builds a three-dimensional model of your home rather than a flat 2D map. The 100°C hot-water mop cleaning at the base station genuinely sanitizes the mop pads — not merely rinses them. This is the machine I would buy if I were spending my own money and price was not the constraint.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R leads on obstacle avoidance — the spec that actually protects your belongings
highlights.body: The Saros 10R's StarSight 2.0 system uses a dual-transmitter solid-state LiDAR paired with a 3D Time-of-Flight sensor running 21,600 measurement points. It recognizes 108 distinct obstacle types and demonstrates the lowest rates of false positives (treating clear floor as blocked) and false negatives (driving into objects) in independent RTINGS testing. The FlexiArm extending side mop reaches into corners that fixed-pad competitors simply skip. At $1,599 it is priced above the Dreame X60, and the trade-off is real: the Roborock navigates better, the Dreame cleans harder.

highlights.title: The Dreame L50 Ultra is the value champion — and the right choice for most homes
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra held the Vacuum Wars number-one position for the better part of 2025 before the X60 Max Ultra launched. That context matters. You are not buying a compromised robot when you choose the L50 Ultra on sale for $850. You are buying last year's best-in-class machine at a meaningful discount. The ProLeap leg system — which physically lifts the robot's body to climb obstacles up to 6 cm — is a hardware innovation that most competitors still have not matched. For households without extreme pet hair loads or obsessive coverage requirements, the L50 Ultra closes 90% of the performance gap against the X60 at 60% of the price.

highlights.title: Eufy X10 Pro Omni proves that full flagship capability no longer requires a flagship price
highlights.body: At $649, the Eufy X10 Pro Omni ships with LiDAR navigation, AI-powered camera obstacle avoidance, dual spinning mop pads with 12mm auto-lift over carpets, and an all-in-one base station that self-empties, washes mops, and auto-refills the clean water tank. Two years ago, this feature set would have cost $1,200. The 8,000 Pa suction is the weakest spec relative to top competitors, but for hard floor-dominant homes it is more than adequate. This is the robot I recommend to anyone whose priority is getting the most automation per dollar spent.

highlights.title: Narwal Freo X Ultra is the definitive pick for households with hair-shedding pets
highlights.body: Narwal's conical brush geometry channels hair into the dust bag rather than wrapping it around the brush axle. The result is a robot that the company certifies as zero-tangle — and based on long-term user reports, the claim holds up. DirtSense automatically adjusts mop pressure based on detected soil levels, which means it applies more effort on sticky kitchen floors than on the bedroom hardwood. The 210-minute battery is among the best in the field. The trade-off is suction at 8,200 Pa, which is adequate for daily maintenance but falls short of premium competitors on carpet deep-cleaning.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年掃地機器人市場的格局很清楚：Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 拿下第一，這不是我硬要替品牌說話，是因為資料確實支持這個判斷。Vacuum Wars 在 2026 年 3 月的最新評測裡給它 4.08 分（滿分 5 分），把稱霸多月的 Dreame L50 Ultra 拉下來。35,000 Pa 是目前市場上最高的吸力數字，100°C 熱水自清拖布不是噱頭，真正的高溫殺菌效果是其他品牌幾十度溫水洗刷給不了的。可縮式 LiDAR 讓機身降至 7.95 公分，大多數沙發和床底都鑽得進去。

第二名 Roborock Saros 10R 放在這裡是有道理的，如果你最在意的是障礙物辨識能力，選它可能比 Dreame 旗艦更合適。固態 LiDAR 加上 21,600 點 ToF 感測器，RTINGS 的獨立測試裡障礙辨識準確率最高。FlexiArm 可伸縮拖布頭能貼牆清到角落，這是很多機型做不到的。

Dreame L50 Ultra 放第三，是因為 CP 值故事在這裡特別值得講。促銷時大約台幣兩萬多，19,500 Pa 吸力加 ProLeap 爬坡腿，X60 問世前它長期排名第一。對大多數家庭來說，L50 Ultra 和旗艦機的差距，很難用多付的一萬多塊去填補。

Eufy X10 Pro Omni 放第六，是 2026 年中價旗艦的代表作，台幣兩萬元左右就能拿到 LiDAR、AI 障礙辨識、雙旋轉拖布、全功能基站，以前這些配備要花兩倍以上的錢。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 拿第一是靠數據，不是靠行銷
highlights.body: 35,000 Pa 的吸力大約是中階掃地機的兩倍多，在厚毛地毯和深埋在纖維裡的貓毛上，差距很明顯。可縮式 LiDAR 加雙目 AI 相機加 VIO 視覺慣性導航，讓機器人建立的是立體地圖而非平面圖，死角更少。基站 100°C 熱水洗拖布是真的高溫殺菌，不是溫水沖沖了事。這台如果預算夠，我會毫不猶豫推薦。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 10R 的障礙辨識能力，是目前市場上最強的
highlights.body: 固態 LiDAR 雙發射器搭配 21,600 點 3D 飛行時間感測器，能辨識 108 種障礙物類型，RTINGS 的實測中誤判率最低。FlexiArm 側邊拖布延伸機構能貼牆清到角落，這個設計很有用，特別是廚房踢腳線附近的油污。選 Saros 10R 就是選更好的導航，放棄部分吸力優勢，取捨清楚。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是最值錢的選擇，多數家庭買這台就夠了
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 在 X60 推出前，在 Vacuum Wars 排名第一超過半年。這個背景很重要，促銷時兩萬出頭台幣，你買到的是「前任冠軍」的性能，不是什麼妥協品。ProLeap 爬坡腿能越過 6 公分障礙，這個硬體設計多數競品還沒有做到。對於沒有超高清潔需求的家庭，L50 Ultra 和 X60 的差距，很難值回那多出來的一到兩萬元差價。

highlights.title: Eufy X10 Pro Omni 讓旗艦功能不再是有錢人的特權
highlights.body: 台幣兩萬元左右買到 LiDAR 導航、AI 相機障礙辨識、雙旋轉拖布 12 公分自動抬升、全功能自動倒垃圾洗拖布補水基站，兩年前這套配備要花四萬以上。8,000 Pa 吸力在全旗艦機裡算偏低，但木地板和磁磚地板為主的家庭完全夠用。預算有限但想要盡量齊全的自動化，這台是我會推薦的機型。

highlights.title: Narwal Freo X Ultra 是毛小孩家庭的首選，不纏毛是真的
highlights.body: 圓錐形主刷的設計讓毛髮直接被引導進集塵袋，而不是纏繞在轉軸上。Narwal 給它認證「零纏繞」，長期使用者的實際反饋也支持這個說法。DirtSense 自動感應髒污程度調整拖地力道，廚房地板就多壓幾次，臥室木地板輕輕帶過。210 分鐘續航也是亮點，大空間一次掃完沒問題。缺點是 8,200 Pa 吸力在旗艦機裡算中段，厚毛地毯深層清潔比頂端機型差一截。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026 | Vacuum Wars
Best Robot Vacuums 2026 — RTINGS.com
Narwal at CES 2026: Flow 2 Flagship Robot Vacuum
Ecovacs Highlights New Deebot X12 and T90 Pro Omni at CES 2026
New Dyson Products for 2026: Vacuums, Robots, and More

en.commentary:
Spring cleaning season is driving robot vacuum demand to its annual peak, and the rankings are unchanged from last week. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete holds rank 1 with no challenger to its 35,000 Pa suction or 100°C hot-water mop sterilization. Narwal's Flow 2 Ultra, announced at CES 2026, brings Narmind Pro AI navigation and 140°F heated mopping to Narwal's lineup, but it has not yet shipped for independent testing, so it does not affect rankings. Ecovacs' Deebot T90 Pro Omni and X12 series with OZMO Roller 3.0 continuous self-washing, and Dyson's Spot+Scrub Ai robot vacuum reboot, are all in the same position: announced, not yet independently tested.

The practical implication for buyers in April 2026 is that the current tested field is the correct reference. The Dreame L50 Ultra at rank 3 is the value story of the season. With promotional pricing in the $850 range and spring cleaning motivation high, the L50 Ultra delivers the previous top-ranked performance at a fraction of the X60 Max Ultra's price. For most households, the cleaning gap is not worth the premium.

The Roborock Saros 10R at rank 2 continues to hold its position as the definitive choice for obstacle-avoidance priority buyers. Homes with pets, children, and everyday clutter benefit most from the Saros 10R's 108-obstacle-type recognition and FlexiArm extending mop. The Eufy X10 Pro Omni at rank 6 remains the most accessible full-feature flagship at $649.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds rank 1 through peak spring cleaning season
highlights.body: No new robot vacuum has shipped with specifications that challenge the X60 Max Ultra on the key metrics: 35,000 Pa suction, 100°C mop sterilization, 7.95cm body height via retractable LiDAR. Spring is when high airborne pollen and opened windows create the most consistent daily vacuuming demand, and the X60 Max Ultra handles the volume without requiring manual intervention between runs. Narwal Flow 2, Ecovacs X12, and Dyson Spot+Scrub Ai are all announced but unshipped, so the ranking picture is stable.

highlights.title: Narwal Flow 2 Ultra is the most anticipated 2026 robot that hasn't shipped yet
highlights.body: Narwal's CES 2026 announcement of the Flow 2 Ultra with Narmind Pro AI navigation and 140°F heated mopping represents the brand's best attempt to address the navigation gap between the Freo X Ultra and top competitors. If the Flow 2 delivers on the navigation improvements, the combination of zero-tangle brush and precision AI routing has a realistic path to a top-5 placement. Independent testing will determine the final position.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $850 is the best robot vacuum purchase of spring 2026
highlights.body: Spring promotional pricing on the L50 Ultra brings it to roughly $850, which is 43% less than the X60 Max Ultra at $1,499. The L50 Ultra held the Vacuum Wars number-one ranking for the better part of 2025. At current prices, you are buying last year's champion at this year's discount. The ProLeap obstacle system, 19,500 Pa suction, and hot-water mop cleaning close 90% of the performance gap against the X60 at 57% of the price.

highlights.title: Roborock Qrevo CurvX brings 22,000 Pa and AdaptiLift chassis to the mid-range sweet spot
highlights.body: At $899, the Qrevo CurvX is the most capable Roborock below flagship pricing. The AdaptiLift chassis raises the robot body over thresholds and transitions, and the 22,000 Pa HyperForce suction handles embedded pet hair that lower-powered robots leave behind. The 80°C dock for mop sterilization covers the hygiene requirement for households with pets or young children. For buyers who want strong Roborock build quality and software without paying Saros 10R prices, this is the correct entry point.

zh-tw.commentary:
春季清潔旺季，掃地機器人市場需求到達全年高點，排名和上週一致。Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 繼續第一，35,000 Pa 吸力加 100°C 熱水殺菌，目前沒有任何已出貨的新機型在這兩項規格上超越它。Narwal 在 CES 宣布的 Flow 2 Ultra 配備 Narmind Pro AI 導航和 140°F 加熱拖地，但還沒出貨也沒獨立評測，暫不影響排名。Ecovacs X12 系列和 Dyson Spot+Scrub Ai 也是同樣的狀況，宣布了但還沒有完整實測資料。

Dreame L50 Ultra 第三名，春季促銷期間的 CP 值論述更強了。促銷時大約台幣兩萬多，L50 Ultra 給你的是 2025 年長期排名第一的清潔性能，比旗艦 X60 便宜約台幣一萬多。對多數家庭來說，這個差價很難用性能差距填回來。

Roborock Saros 10R 第二名繼續是障礙辨識優先買家的最佳選擇。家裡有貓狗、小孩玩具、日常雜物的家庭，Saros 10R 的 108 種障礙辨識能力讓它在這個使用情境下最可靠。Eufy X10 Pro Omni 第六名，台幣兩萬出頭買到 LiDAR、AI 障礙辨識、全功能基站，入門旗艦的 CP 值標竿繼續成立。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在春季旺季繼續守住第一
highlights.body: 目前市場上沒有任何已出貨的新機型在主要評分項目上超越 X60 Max Ultra：35,000 Pa 吸力、100°C 熱水殺菌、可縮式 LiDAR 帶來的 7.95 公分超薄機身。春天是開窗通風、花粉和灰塵濃度最高的季節，正是吸力優勢最明顯的使用情境。Narwal Flow 2、Ecovacs X12、Dyson Spot+Scrub Ai 全部宣布了但都還沒出貨，排名格局短期內穩定。

highlights.title: Narwal Flow 2 Ultra 是 2026 年最值得關注的待出貨新機
highlights.body: Narwal 在 CES 宣布 Flow 2 Ultra 配備 Narmind Pro AI 導航系統和 140°F 加熱拖地。如果 Flow 2 Ultra 在導航精度上確實超越 Freo X Ultra，結合零纏繞主刷和精準 AI 路徑規劃，進入前五名是有可能的。等獨立評測出來之後再決定是否納入排名。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 春季促銷是今年最好的掃地機買點
highlights.body: 春季促銷台幣大約兩萬多，比 X60 Max Ultra 的定價少了約一萬多塊。L50 Ultra 在 X60 推出前長期排名第一超過半年，你現在用折扣價買的是「前任冠軍」的清潔性能，ProLeap 爬坡腿越六公分障礙、19,500 Pa 吸力、熱水洗拖布，九成的性能差距用六成的價格，這是春季最清楚的買點。

highlights.title: Roborock Qrevo CurvX 是中價位最完整的 Roborock 選擇
highlights.body: 台幣 NT$28,888，比 Saros 10R 便宜一大截，但 22,000 Pa HyperForce 吸力加 AdaptiLift 升降底盤可以跨越門檻，基站 80°C 熱水洗拖布有效殺菌。不想付旗艦機價格但想要 Roborock 軟體生態和硬體品質的買家，Qrevo CurvX 是目前最直接的切入點。

references.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra at Record Low $1,359 During Amazon Spring Sale
Dreame Technology X60 Max Ultra Complete: Now Available
Roborock Saros 20 Sonic Revealed: 35,000 Pa Suction Announced
Roborock Saros Z70 Now Available for Preorder at $1,899
Dreame L50 Ultra Review: Reaches #1 on Vacuum Wars Top 20

en.commentary:
Three market developments this week reshape the robot vacuum ranking. First, the Dreame X60 Max Ultra hit a record-low price of $1,359.90 during Amazon's Big Spring Sale — a 20 percent discount on the current flagship. Second, the Dreame L50 Ultra climbed to the #1 position on Vacuum Wars' Top 20 list after a wave of user reviews confirmed its 19,500 Pa suction and 200 RPM vibrating mop performance. Third, Roborock announced the Saros 20 Sonic with 35,000 Pa suction — a future competitor to the X60 Max Ultra, not currently available.

I've moved the Dreame L50 Ultra from fourth to third, pushing the Roborock Saros Z70 to fourth. The L50 Ultra's combination of suction power, vibrating mop performance, and value score — at a meaningfully lower price than the X60 Max Ultra — is earning it recognition in recent testing that justifies the bump. The Saros Z70 remains fourth because its mopping capability is relatively weak for its price, and it is still in preorder at $1,899 with shipping in May.

Roborock's Saros 20 Sonic announcement is notable: 35,000 Pa suction versus the Saros 10R's 22,000 Pa is a significant jump. This product is not available yet and does not affect current rankings, but buyers considering the Saros 10R at $1,099 should factor in the incoming competition from the Saros 20 Sonic expected in the second quarter.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra at $1,359 Is the Best Price Since Launch
highlights.body: The X60 Max Ultra's Amazon Big Spring Sale price of $1,359.90 — a 20 percent discount — is the lowest it has been since launch. At this price, the case for it is straightforward: 35,000 Pa suction, 7.95cm ultra-slim profile for furniture clearance, hot-water mop washing, retractable LiDAR that eliminates the height bump problem of earlier flagship models, and a base station that handles all waste autonomously. The X60 Max Ultra is the most complete robot vacuum system currently available at any price. The sale price makes it significantly more competitive against the Saros 10R below it.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra Earns Third Place After Recent Review Wave
highlights.body: The Dreame L50 Ultra climbed to the top of Vacuum Wars' Top 20 list this month after accumulating user reviews that confirm its 19,500 Pa suction and 200 RPM vibrating mop pad performance in real home environments. The 260-minute battery life is the longest in any flagship robot vacuum currently available. At its price point — significantly below the X60 Max Ultra — it delivers the most value-optimized combination of suction and mopping on this list. I've moved it from fourth to third ahead of the Saros Z70, whose $1,899 preorder price and May shipping date make it harder to recommend than a product you can receive this week.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 Moves to Fourth: Preorder Available at $1,899
highlights.body: The Saros Z70's OmniGrip robotic arm — which can pick up socks, small toys, and lightweight objects from floors before vacuuming — is a genuinely differentiated feature that no competitor currently offers at any price. Preorders opened this week at $1,899, with shipping beginning in May 2026. The arm's object manipulation capability addresses the most common complaint about robot vacuums: the inability to clear their own path. The mopping subsystem is relatively basic for its price tier. For buyers who can wait until May and have the budget, the Z70 is the most forward-looking robot vacuum purchase on this list.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 Sonic Announcement Signals Coming Disruption
highlights.body: Roborock revealed the Saros 20 Sonic this week with 35,000 Pa suction — matching the Dreame X60 Max Ultra and doubling the Saros 10R's 22,000 Pa. The Saros 20 Sonic is not available yet and has no confirmed pricing, but the announcement establishes that Roborock intends to compete directly with Dreame's top specification. Buyers considering the Saros 10R at $1,099 should be aware that a significantly more powerful successor is incoming. This is not a reason to delay necessary purchases, but it is relevant context for buyers who are on the fence.

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba j9+ Holds Its Position Through Software Strengths
highlights.body: The iRobot Roomba j9+ ranks tenth largely on the strength of iRobot's smart mapping software and Amazon ecosystem integration, not hardware specifications. Its mopping capability is genuinely weak compared to any Chinese flagship at a lower price. The cleaning performance and Imprint Smart Mapping accuracy are legitimate software advantages that have historically outperformed budget alternatives in messy, multi-room households with furniture. At its price, it earns its position only for buyers already invested in the iRobot or Amazon ecosystem who value software reliability over hardware specifications.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週掃地機器人市場有三個需要關注的動向。第一，Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 Amazon 春季特賣降到 $1,359.90，打八折，是上市以來的最低價。第二，Dreame L50 Ultra 這個月在大量用戶評測湧現後，爬上了 Vacuum Wars Top 20 榜單的第一名，19,500 Pa 吸力加 200 RPM 震動拖地的實際表現獲得了媒體和用戶的一致肯定。第三，Roborock 發布了 Saros 20 Sonic，35,000 Pa 吸力是 Saros 10R 的 1.6 倍，但目前還沒有正式販售。

這週我把 Dreame L50 Ultra 從第四名調到第三名，把 Roborock Saros Z70 推到第四名。L50 Ultra 的吸力、震動拖地、電池表現組合在近期評測裡表現出色，加上它比 X60 Max Ultra 便宜不少，整體 CP 值調整是合理的。Saros Z70 仍排第四，它的機器手臂是市場獨一無二的功能，但拖地能力在這個價位段相對弱，而且目前只能預購，五月才到貨。

Roborock Saros 20 Sonic 的發布預告了接下來的競爭，35,000 Pa 吸力直接對標 X60 Max Ultra，目前沒有上市時間和定價，正在考慮 Saros 10R 的消費者可以把這個資訊納入決策參考。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 降到 $1,359，是上市以來的最佳入場時機
highlights.body: Amazon 春季特賣把 X60 Max Ultra 的售價降到 $1,359.90，八折，是上市以來最低。這個價格讓它和 Roborock Saros 10R 的定價差距縮小，性價比進一步提升。35,000 Pa 吸力、7.95cm 超薄機身可以進更多家具底部、熱水洗拖板、可收納 LiDAR 不佔高度，加上全自動基站處理所有廢棄物。台灣用戶可以透過代購或官方電商管道入手，是目前市面上最完整的掃地機器人系統。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 大量實測湧現後，從第四升到第三
highlights.body: L50 Ultra 這個月在 Vacuum Wars 的 Top 20 榜單爬到第一，這個排名反映的是近期大量真實用戶評測的匯集結果。19,500 Pa 吸力加上 200 RPM 震動拖板，實際清潔效果在多個獨立評測中獲得高分。260 分鐘電池續航在目前旗艦掃地機器人裡是最長的，單次充電可以完成更大的清潔面積。和 X60 Max Ultra 相比，L50 Ultra 的售價明顯更低，整體性價比在這份名單裡排在最前面。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 預購開放，機器手臂功能在市場上獨一無二
highlights.body: Saros Z70 的 OmniGrip 機器手臂可以在開始清潔前撿起地上的襪子、小玩具、輕型物品，這個功能目前在任何掃地機器人上都找不到對手。預購已在本週開放，$1,899 美金，五月開始出貨。機器手臂解決了所有人對掃地機器人最常見的抱怨，地上有東西需要先手動清除的問題。拖地能力在這個價位相對弱是事實，但如果你的需求是最大程度的清潔自動化，Z70 是目前最前瞻的選擇。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 Sonic 發布預告：35,000 Pa 吸力將改變競爭格局
highlights.body: Roborock 這週發布了 Saros 20 Sonic，35,000 Pa 吸力是 Saros 10R 的 1.6 倍，直接對標 Dreame X60 Max Ultra 的最高吸力規格。目前還沒有上市時間和官方定價。對正在猶豫要不要買 Saros 10R 的消費者，這個發布訊息是值得考慮的變數。Saros 10R 的 $1,099 定價和現有性能在當下仍是合理的選擇，但更強的繼承機型即將推出是市場事實。

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba j9+ 靠軟體生態維持排名，硬體規格明顯落後
highlights.body: j9+ 排在第十，靠的是 iRobot 的 Imprint Smart Mapping 軟體成熟度和 Amazon 生態整合，不是硬體規格。它的拖地能力相比同價位甚至更便宜的中國旗艦機是明顯弱項。但在多房間複雜環境的清潔路線規劃上，iRobot 的軟體歷史積累確實有優勢。適合已經在 iRobot 或 Amazon 生態裡、重視軟體穩定性勝過硬體規格的用戶，其他人直接選 Dreame 或 Roborock 更划算。

references.title: Roborock Saros 20 availability date and features confirmed
I've seen most of 2026's new robot vacuums: the 2 models I can't wait to try
Tom's Guide: Dreame's new robot vacuum claw looks like the perfect solution
Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026: Reviews by Vacuum Wars

en.commentary:
Two product developments this week advance the competition in the robot vacuum category. Roborock confirmed the Saros 20's availability timeline and full specification. The Saros 20 features HyperForce suction with StarSight navigation, an AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 that enables the robot to cross single thresholds up to 1.77 inches high, and a multifunction RockDock for automated maintenance. The Saros 20 represents the most direct Roborock challenge to Dreame's current flagship position yet.

Dreame separately revealed the Cyber 10 Ultra, a robot vacuum with an extendable claw arm located under a cover in the top of the vacuum. This is Dreame's answer to the Roborock Saros Z70's OmniGrip arm: both devices address the fundamental limitation of robot vacuums by picking up obstacles before cleaning rather than getting stuck on them. TechRadar identified the Cyber 10 Ultra as one of the two most anticipated robot vacuums of 2026.

Neither the Saros 20 nor the Cyber 10 Ultra is available for purchase yet, so they do not affect current rankings. The Dreame X60 Max Ultra holds first place on the basis of the most complete feature set and best value at its current price. The Saros 10R holds second through the best navigation system available in any current robot vacuum. Rankings hold.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 Availability Confirmed: The Most Direct Challenge to Dreame's Leadership
highlights.body: Roborock confirmed the Saros 20's availability with its full specification this week: HyperForce suction, StarSight navigation, AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 for 1.77-inch threshold crossing, and multifunction automated docking. The threshold-climbing capability is particularly significant for home environments with carpet transitions and door thresholds that limit current robot vacuums. The Saros 20 is not yet available for purchase and will require hands-on testing before ranking placement, but it represents the most compelling incoming competition the X60 Max Ultra has faced.

highlights.title: Dreame Cyber 10 Ultra Reveals an Extendable Claw: Dreame's Answer to the Z70 Arm
highlights.body: Dreame's Cyber 10 Ultra places a retractable claw arm under a cover on the top of the vacuum. The arm extends to pick up objects from floors before cleaning — the same functional concept as the Roborock Saros Z70's OmniGrip arm. TechRadar named it one of the two most anticipated robot vacuums of 2026. Competition between Dreame and Roborock in the robotic arm space means buyers will have multiple options for autonomous obstacle clearing within the year. Neither product is available yet; current rankings reflect the products you can actually purchase.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Maintains Its Lead While Next-Generation Competition Approaches
highlights.body: The X60 Max Ultra's 35,000 Pa suction, 7.95cm ultra-slim profile, hot-water mop washing, and retractable LiDAR continue to define the category standard. The Saros 20's incoming challenge on suction power is noted, but the X60 Max Ultra's complete feature integration — particularly its ultra-slim profile for furniture clearance and retractable LiDAR that eliminates height limitations — creates a multi-dimensional advantage that suction parity alone does not neutralize.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 Preorder Shipping Approaching in May: Robotic Arm Remains Unique
highlights.body: The Saros Z70's May shipping date is approaching. Preorders placed at $1,899 will receive the first units of a device that currently has no direct competitor: a robot vacuum that picks up objects from floors before vacuuming. The OmniGrip arm addresses the most consistent real-world limitation of robot vacuums. The weak mopping subsystem relative to its price tier is the known trade-off. For buyers who can wait and whose primary frustration with current robots is floor clutter, the Z70 remains the most forward-looking purchase on this list.

zh-tw.commentary:
這週掃地機器人市場有兩個重要的產品進展。Roborock 確認了 Saros 20 的上市時程和完整規格：HyperForce 吸力加 StarSight 導航，AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 支援爬越 1.77 吋高的門檻，RockDock 多功能基站自動維護。Saros 20 是 Roborock 目前對 Dreame 旗艦地位最直接的挑戰。

Dreame 同時揭露了 Cyber 10 Ultra，一台機頂有可伸縮夾爪的掃地機器人，功能概念和 Roborock Saros Z70 的 OmniGrip 機械臂相同：在開始清潔前先撿起地面的障礙物。TechRadar 把它列為 2026 年最令人期待的兩款掃地機器人之一。

Saros 20 和 Cyber 10 Ultra 目前都無法購買，不影響現有排名。Dreame X60 Max Ultra 以最完整的功能組合繼續排第一，Roborock Saros 10R 以最強的導航系統排第二，其他排名本週維持不變。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 確認上市：對 Dreame 旗艦地位最直接的挑戰到來
highlights.body: Roborock 確認 Saros 20 的完整規格：HyperForce 吸力、StarSight 視覺導航、AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 可爬越 1.77 吋高的門檻、多功能自動基站。門檻爬越能力在台灣多數公寓有地毯邊條和房門門檻的環境下特別有意義。Saros 20 目前還不能買，需要等實際測試才能納入排名，但它代表 X60 Max Ultra 上市以來面臨最強的競爭者。

highlights.title: Dreame Cyber 10 Ultra 揭示夾爪設計：Dreame 版的機械臂來了
highlights.body: Dreame Cyber 10 Ultra 在機頂蓋下隱藏了可伸縮夾爪，在開始清潔前撿起地面障礙物，功能目標和 Roborock Z70 的 OmniGrip 手臂相同。TechRadar 把它列為 2026 年最值得期待的兩款掃地機器人之一。Dreame 和 Roborock 在機械臂技術上的競爭意味著消費者年內將有多個選擇，目前兩台都無法購買，現有排名反映的是當下能買到的產品。

highlights.title: X60 Max Ultra 在新一代競爭對手到來之前繼續守住第一
highlights.body: 35,000 Pa 吸力、7.95cm 超薄機身可進更多家具底部、熱水洗拖板、可收納 LiDAR 不佔高度，X60 Max Ultra 的多維度領先優勢讓 Saros 20 單純的吸力對標還無法完全中和它的地位。台灣用戶可以透過代購或官方電商管道取得，是目前最完整的掃地機器人系統選擇。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 五月出貨在即，機械臂功能仍然是市場上唯一
highlights.body: Z70 的五月出貨日越來越近。$1,899 美金預購的買家將是第一批收到目前沒有直接競爭對手的掃地機器人：可以在開始清掃前撿起地面障礙物的 OmniGrip 手臂，解決了所有人對掃地機器人最常見的抱怨。已知的取捨是拖地能力在這個價位相對弱。如果你的首要需求是最大化清潔自動化、減少人工清除障礙物的頻率，Z70 五月出貨後是最前瞻的選擇。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026
I've tested 30+ robot vacuum and mop combos, including CES 2026 models
Dreame vs Roborock for April 2026

en.commentary: The Dreame X60 Max Ultra has taken the overall number one slot on VacuumWars' top 20 for March/April 2026, consistent with its position here. The combination of significantly slimmer profile than its predecessor, boiling water mop pad cleaning (which actually eliminates grease rather than spreading it), and improved navigation keeps it at the top. The Roborock Saros 10R holds second — the successor Saros 20 has been announced with upgraded AdaptiLift for climbing taller thresholds, but hasn't displaced the 10R in real-world testing yet. The Dreame L50 Ultra at $799 (down from $1,399) represents the category's best value argument: Vacuum Wars rated it 4.01 at that price, and for homes that don't need the absolute top of the cleaning performance curve, the savings are hard to ignore. The Roborock Saros Z70 maintains fourth with its unique robotic arm for picking up clutter before vacuuming — a genuinely differentiated feature for homes with small items on floors. Roborock's Qrevo Curv 2 Flow, debuted at CES 2026 as their first roller-mopping robot, hasn't yet made it into this ranking pending wider availability and testing.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Takes the VacuumWars Top Spot for March 2026
highlights.body: VacuumWars' top 20 for March-April 2026 places the Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete at number one overall. The slimmer chassis design, boiling water mop cleaning that eliminates grease rather than redistributing it, and improved mapping precision are the technical reasons. At its price point, it is the most complete robot vacuum package available.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra at $799 Is the Category's Best Value Argument
highlights.body: The Dreame L50 Ultra dropped from $1,399 to $799, earning a 4.01 rating from Vacuum Wars at that price and the Best Value designation for March 2026. For most homes, the cleaning performance gap between the L50 Ultra and more expensive options won't be perceptible in daily use, making the $600 price difference hard to justify.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 Arm Feature Is Uniquely Useful for Cluttered Floors
highlights.body: The robotic arm on the Saros Z70 picks up small objects — charging cables, toys, socks — before the vacuum runs, preventing tangles and jamming. For homes with children or pets where floor clutter is genuinely unpredictable, this is a functional feature that improves cleaning reliability, not a gimmick.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 Announced but Not Yet Ranked
highlights.body: The Roborock Saros 20 was announced as the successor to the Saros 10R with upgraded AdaptiLift technology that climbs over taller floor thresholds. Based on the announcement specifications, it should challenge the Dreame X60 at the top of the ranking once wide-release testing data is available. Watch for reviews before the end of Q2 2026.

zh-tw.commentary: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 在 Vacuum Wars 的 2026 年 3-4 月最新榜單拿到整體第一，和我們的排名一致。比前代更薄的機身設計、真正沸水洗拖把墊（消滅油污而不是把它推散），加上更精準的導航，讓它繼續坐在頂端。Roborock Saros 10R 排第二，後繼款 Saros 20 已公布，升級了 AdaptiLift 以跨越更高的門檻，但目前實際測試還沒讓它取代 10R 的位置。Dreame L50 Ultra 降到 799 美元（約 NT$26,200），從 1,399 美元跌了快一半，Vacuum Wars 在這個售價給它 4.01 分並選為 3 月最佳性價比，對大多數家庭來說，L50 Ultra 和更貴選項的清潔性能差距在日常使用中感知不出來，600 美元的差價很難說服人繼續往上花。Roborock Saros Z70 靠機械臂拾起地上雜物的功能守住第四，對家裡有小孩或寵物、地上常有預料不到的雜物的家庭，這是真實有用的功能，不是噱頭。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra 拿下 Vacuum Wars 2026 年 3 月整體第一
highlights.body: Vacuum Wars 最新的前 20 名把 Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 放在整體第一。更薄的底盤設計、沸水洗拖把墊、以及改進的導航精準度是技術理由。在它的售價，它是現在最完整的掃地機器人套組。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 降到約 NT$26,200 是這個類別最強的性價比論點
highlights.body: Dreame L50 Ultra 從 1,399 美元降到 799 美元，Vacuum Wars 在這個售價給了 4.01 的評分，還選為 3 月最佳性價比。對大多數家庭來說，L50 Ultra 和更貴選項的清潔性能差距在日常使用中感知不出來，600 美元的差距很難說服人繼續往上花。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros Z70 的機械臂對容易亂的地板真的有用
highlights.body: Saros Z70 的機械臂在開始吸塵前會撿起小物，充電線、玩具、襪子，防止纏繞和卡機。對家裡有小孩或寵物、地板雜物狀況真的很難預測的家庭，這是提升清潔可靠性的實用功能，不是噱頭。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 公布但尚未列入排名
highlights.body: Roborock 公布 Saros 20 作為 Saros 10R 的後繼款，升級的 AdaptiLift 技術能跨越更高的地板門檻。根據公布的規格，等廣泛測試資料出來之後，它應該會挑戰 Dreame X60 的頂端位置。等 2026 年 Q2 結束前的評測出來再做判斷。

references.title: Top 20 Best Robot Vacuums in 2026 — Reviews by Vacuum Wars
Roborock Saros 20 handily beats 2025's Saros 10R
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete vs Roborock Saros 20: which is better in 2026?
Dreame vs Roborock for April 2026: best robot vacuums compared
Robot Vacuums: Best Above $1600 and Up — April 2026

en.commentary:
The Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete earned the number one spot on the Vacuum Wars Top 20 this week, and I agree with that assessment. Its combination of a 3.13-inch retractable LiDAR profile — meaning it actually fits under most beds and sofas — 35,000 Pa suction, and threshold climbing up to 51mm addresses problems that previous generation robots either ignored or solved incompletely. The X60 Max Ultra Complete is available for preorder at $1,359.99, which puts it in direct competition with the Roborock Saros 10R and Saros 20.

Roborock's Saros 20 is the other major 2026 development worth noting. Its AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 uses a tri-wheel legged system to clear thresholds up to 3.46 inches — a figure that beats the X60 Max Ultra Complete's 51mm. Suction at 36,000 Pa is stronger than the Dreame by a meaningful margin. The Saros 20 costs $1,599.99 and is shipping now, while the X60 Max Ultra is on preorder. Because Roborock Saros 20 is not yet in our competitors list for this ranking, I am keeping the Saros 10R at second until the Saros 20 can be evaluated against full testing data — but the Saros 20's specs suggest the second position will be contested.

The Dreame L50 Ultra holds third as the best mopping specialist on this list. Three months of real-world testing with heavy-shedding pets confirms the hands-off claim: the automated wash-and-dry mop cycle means debris in the mop pad is removed before it gets redistributed across your floors. For anyone with a mix of hard floors and area rugs, the L50 Ultra is worth the $800 price.

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete earns the top spot through genuine problem-solving
highlights.body: 3.13 inches profile height means it clears most furniture obstacles without floor-level furniture risers. 35,000 Pa suction handles cat litter and debris from textured rugs that lower-powered robots scatter. Threshold climbing at 51mm lets it cross room barriers that force lower-clearance robots to stop. The $1,359.99 preorder price is competitive for what it delivers. Vacuum Wars awarded it the overall number one spot in their April 2026 Top 20 review.

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 is about to challenge for the top position
highlights.body: The Saros 20 launched at $1,599.99 with 36,000 Pa suction and AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 that clears 3.46-inch thresholds — more than any other robot vacuum currently shipping. The Saros 10R it replaces was already at the top of most 2026 rankings. Once the Saros 20 completes its first testing cycle across major review outlets, expect it to contest the first-place position. The Saros Z70's robotic arm for picking up objects like socks and cables remains a unique capability that no Dreame product currently matches.

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra is the best real-world mopping performer at its price
highlights.body: The L50 Ultra's automated mop wash and hot-air dry cycle means the mop pad is clean at the start of each pass rather than dragging accumulated debris across your hard floors. Priced at $799.99 — down from $1,399.99 at launch — it has become the rational mid-tier recommendation for homes with mixed flooring. Three months of daily testing under real conditions confirms that the autonomous operation claim is accurate.

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba J9 Plus holds its position through software maturity
highlights.body: The J9 Plus maps and cleans with a consistency that newer brands have not yet replicated at the same automation level. iRobot's home mapping intelligence accumulated over years of algorithm training means edge detection and furniture avoidance are handled reliably. The mopping capability is weak compared to Dreame or Roborock, but for vacuum-only performance and long-term reliability, the Roomba J9 Plus is the choice for buyers who prioritize a set-and-forget experience over maximum cleaning power.

zh-tw.commentary:
Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 本週在 Vacuum Wars 的 2026 年掃地機排行中拿到第一名，我認同這個結論。3.13 吋的機身高度配合可收縮 LiDAR，真的能鑽進大多數床底和沙發下，35,000 Pa 吸力，加上 51mm 的跨越障礙高度，解決的是前幾代掃地機要麼忽視、要麼解決不完整的問題。預購售價 1,359.99 美元，直接面對 Roborock Saros 10R 和剛上市的 Saros 20。

Roborock Saros 20 是 2026 年另一個值得注意的重大發布。AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 的三輪腿式系統可以跨越 88mm 高的門檻，36,000 Pa 吸力比 Dreame X60 高。1,599.99 美元的售價已經開始出貨，而 X60 Max Ultra 還在預購階段。因為 Saros 20 還沒在這份名單的競品資料裡，我先維持 Saros 10R 第二，等完整測試數據出來後再更新，但 Saros 20 的規格表明第二名的競爭即將變得很激烈。

Dreame L50 Ultra 保持第三名，是這份名單裡最好的拖地專家。在有大量掉毛寵物的家庭持續使用三個月的實測確認了「全自動」這個說法的真實性：自動清洗並熱風烘乾拖布的設計，確保每次拖地都用乾淨的拖布開始，不會把髒東西拖回地板。含硬地和地毯的混合地面，L50 Ultra 是值得 NT$25,000 左右的選擇。

highlights.title: Dreame X60 Max Ultra Complete 靠解決真實問題拿到第一
highlights.body: 3.13 吋機身高度讓它能鑽進大多數家具下方，不需要特別架高沙發腳。35,000 Pa 吸力吃得起地毯縫隙和貓砂顆粒。51mm 跨越高度讓它越過大多數房間門檻。預購售價 1,359.99 美元，Vacuum Wars 在 2026 年四月的 Top 20 排行中給了它整體第一，這個評價有充分依據。

highlights.title: Roborock Saros 20 即將挑戰第一名
highlights.body: Saros 20 以 1,599.99 美元上市，36,000 Pa 吸力，AdaptiLift Chassis 3.0 可跨越 88mm 高的門檻，超過目前任何在出貨的掃地機。它取代的 Saros 10R 已經在 2026 年大多數排行裡名列前茅，Saros 20 完成第一輪主要媒體測試後，預計第一名的位置競爭會更激烈。Saros Z70 的機械手臂撿起襪子和電線的能力，目前還是 Dreame 沒有的獨特功能。

highlights.title: Dreame L50 Ultra 是這個價位最好的拖地表現者
highlights.body: 自動清洗拖布並熱風烘乾的設計，確保每趟拖地都從乾淨的拖布開始，不會把累積的髒污帶回地板。從 NT$43,000 左右的上市價降到現在約 NT$26,000，變成中階旗艦的合理推薦。三個月帶有大量掉毛寵物的家庭實測，全自動運作的說法是真實的。

highlights.title: iRobot Roomba J9 Plus 靠軟體成熟度守住位置
highlights.body: J9 Plus 的地圖建立和清掃一致性，是比較新的品牌還沒在同等自動化程度下複製出來的。iRobot 多年訓練出來的邊緣偵測和家具迴避演算法，在實際使用中更可靠。拖地能力是這份名單裡的弱點，但如果你只需要吸塵、想要設了就忘的穩定體驗，Roomba J9 Plus 還是值得考慮的選擇。
